last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
last_episode_to_air.overview: Back in the royal capital after their epic triumph, the Suicide Squad are in for a rude awakening.

name: Suicide Squad Isekai
overview: In the crime-ridden city of Gotham, Amanda Waller, the head of A.R.G.U.S., assembles a group of notorious criminals—Harley Quinn, Deadshot, Peacemaker, Clayface and King Shark—for a mission into an otherworldly realm that's connected to this world through a gate. It's a realm of swords and magic where orcs rampage and dragons rule the skies. Can Harley Quinn and her crew conquer this perilous realm?

episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: "A new world" – After going on a rampage with her partner-in-crime, The Joker, Harley Quinn is sent straight to Belle Reve Penitentiary.

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: Harley Quinn, Deadshot, Peacemaker, Clayface and King Shark find themselves in a new world of swords and sorcery, known as an "ISEKAI."

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: Harley Quinn and the Suicide Squad strike a deal with Queen Aldora of the Kingdom to deactivate the bombs in their necks.

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: The war between the Kingdom and the Empire has been raging for decades. Hoping to end the carnage, Princess Fione enlists Harley and her team's help.

episodes.name: Episode 5
episodes.overview: Taking on Ratcatcher's army of beasts turns out to be a piece of cake for the Suicide Squad.

episodes.name: Episode 6
episodes.overview: Notorious criminals Harley Quinn, Deadshot, Peacemaker, Clayface and King Shark embark on a dangerous mission to Isekai, an otherworldly realm of swords, magic, orcs and flying...

episodes.name: Episode 7
episodes.overview: To stop the Suicide Squad from resetting their bombs, Thinker has his elf army build a fortress near the gate. (SubsFlix_)

episodes.name: Episode 8
episodes.overview: Back in the royal capital after their epic triumph, the Suicide Squad are in for a rude awakening.
